US.WA.Seattle.Fire911.mqtt.description: MQTT/5.0 transport variant for Seattle Fire 911 dispatch incidents. Topics are non-retained QoS-1 event messages under civic-events/us/wa/seattle/public-safety/fire-dispatch/{incident_type_slug}/{incident_number}. The incident_type_slug field is the deterministic lowercase kebab-case routing key derived from the display incident_type; incident_number preserves the CloudEvents subject/Kafka key for per-incident subscriptions. Message expiry is 86400 seconds for queued/offline delivery only; this event stream does not use retained MQTT state.

US.WA.Seattle.Fire911.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 transport variants for seattle-911. All CloudEvents are published to the seattle-911 address; the subject and application properties mirror the existing Kafka key and MQTT routing axes.

subject.description: AMQP message subject. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity routing.

incident_type_slug.description: AMQP application property mirroring the incident_type_slug routing axis from the Kafka subject/MQTT topic for broker-side filtering.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key so events for the same entity route consistently across transports.

schema.name: Incident
schema.description: Seattle Fire Department 911 dispatch record from the City of Seattle real-time fire calls dataset.

incident_number.description: Stable Seattle Fire Department incident identifier for the dispatch record.

alternates.name: incident_number
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle Open Data dataset.

incident_type.description: Seattle Fire Department response type display string for the incident, such as Aid Response or Medic Response.

alternates.name: type
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle Open Data dataset.

incident_datetime.description: Date and time of the call as published by the Seattle Open Data dataset, in local dataset timestamp form without an explicit UTC offset.

alternates.name: datetime
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle Open Data dataset.

address.description: Incident location text as published by the dataset.

alternates.name: address
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle Open Data dataset.

latitude.description: Latitude of the incident location in decimal degrees north.

alternates.name: latitude
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle Open Data dataset.

longitude.description: Longitude of the incident location in decimal degrees east of Greenwich; Seattle values are negative because they lie west of Greenwich.

alternates.name: longitude
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle Open Data dataset.

incident_type_slug.description: Deterministic lowercase kebab-case routing slug derived from incident_type by lowercasing ASCII alphanumerics, replacing every run of non-alphanumeric characters with a single hyphen, and trimming leading/trailing hyphens (example: Aid Response - 7 per Unit -> aid-response-7-per-unit).

incident_datetime_utc.description: Incident timestamp normalized to RFC 3339 UTC using America/Los_Angeles for the upstream local dataset timestamp.
